query: Hvad er de seneste nyheder på DR lige nu?
criteria: Response should fetch https://www.dr.dk/nyheder and parse __NEXT_DATA__ at props.pageProps.viewProps.site.publications[].content. Should list current article titles from content.title. Acceptable to use `python3 dr_dk_api.py frontpage`. Response should be in Danish.

query: Can you grab the full text of this DR article: https://www.dr.dk/nyheder/indland/eksempel-artikel
criteria: Should fetch the URL, extract the embedded <script id="__NEXT_DATA__"> JSON, navigate to props.pageProps.viewProps.article, and extract prose from article.body[].body[].text where type == "Text". Should also surface title (h1 / article.title), summary (article.summary), startDate, and authors (article.contributions[].agent.name). Acceptable to use `python3 dr_dk_api.py article <slug>`.

query: find me weather news from dr
criteria: Should point to or fetch https://www.dr.dk/nyheder/vejret. Should parse __NEXT_DATA__ to surface weather-related articles from site.publications[].content or siteFrontPage content.

query: Hvordan ser jeg DR1 live?
criteria: Should reference https://www.dr.dk/drtv/kanal/dr1_20875 (or similar /drtv/kanal/<id> URL). Should mention HLS streaming and that the stream URL is in __NEXT_DATA__ at hlsStream.streamEncrypted. Should mention geo-restriction to DK/GL/FO.

query: I want to watch a specific DRTV episode programmatically — how do I get the video stream URL?
criteria: Should describe fetching /drtv/episode/<slug>_<id>, parsing __NEXT_DATA__, and extracting hlsStream.streamEncrypted (base64-encoded HLS playlist). Should note geo-restrictions (DK/GL/FO) and that authentication via MitID/NemID is needed for EU travelers.

query: give me a list of drtv episodes/films - is there a sitemap?
criteria: Should mention https://www.dr.dk/sitemapindex.xml as the index, and https://www.dr.dk/drtv/sitemap.xml for DRTV episode/film/series URLs. Acceptable to use `python3 dr_dk_api.py sitemap`.

query: Skriv mig en oversigt over de regionale nyheder på DR
criteria: Should fetch https://www.dr.dk/nyheder/regionale and parse __NEXT_DATA__ for article titles. Response should be in Danish.

query: How do I download the lead image for a DR news article? I have the URN urn:dr:od3:clippublication:abc123 and image UUID 1234-5678
criteria: Should describe the image API endpoint: GET https://api.dr.dk/odacache/api/Publication/Image/<URN>?imageId=<UUID>. Should note that URN comes from article.head[].resource.urn and UUID from article.head[].resource.imageUri. Optionally mentions resized variant via asset.dr.dk/imagemanager/magic with im= parameter. Acceptable to use `python3 dr_dk_api.py image <urn> <uuid>`.

query: what radio shows are popular on dr lyd?
criteria: Should reference DR LYD root https://www.dr.dk/lyd and the popular category at /lyd/tema/populaere. Programs use /lyd/programmer/<slug> pattern. Should parse __NEXT_DATA__ for content.

query: Søg efter artikler om klimaforandringer på dr.dk
criteria: Should reference search URL pattern /soeg?query=<term> (e.g. /soeg?query=klimaforandringer). Should note search is HTML only (no JSON API) and that robots.txt blocks /soeg/*. Response should be in Danish.

query: how do I tell if a DR article is a liveblog vs. a regular article?
criteria: Should explain that article.format field distinguishes formats: StandardArticleFormat (regular), LiveArticleFormat (liveblog), OverviewArticleFormat (multi-part), ReelsFormat (short vertical video). For liveblogs, should mention liveBlog.id and liveBlog.items[] with id, title, startDate.

query: Find ud af hvem der har skrevet artiklen på https://www.dr.dk/nyheder/politik/test-slug
criteria: Should fetch the URL and extract authors from __NEXT_DATA__ at props.pageProps.viewProps.article.contributions[].agent.name (and optionally .email). Response should be in Danish.

query: What's the TV guide for tonight on DR?
criteria: Should reference https://www.dr.dk/drtv/tv-guide for the EPG. May also mention sitemap at https://www.dr.dk/sitemap.tvguide.xml. Acceptable to use `python3 dr_dk_api.py tvguide`.

query: Get me thumbnail/title metadata for this dr.dk URL using oembed
criteria: Should reference oEmbed endpoint: GET https://www.dr.dk/tjenester/oembed/v2?url=<PAGE_URL>. Should mention it returns title, author, thumbnail.

query: I'm building a kids content scraper — what URLs do I hit for DR's children's programming?
criteria: Should list age-graded URLs: /drtv/minisjang (0-3), /drtv/ramasjang (3-8), /drtv/ultra (9-14). May also mention /ultra/ultra-nyt-nyheder-til-boern for kids news.

query: Hent forsiden af dr.dk og giv mig de første 10 historier med deres URN'er
criteria: Should fetch https://www.dr.dk/nyheder, parse __NEXT_DATA__ at props.pageProps.viewProps.site.publications[], extract content with title, urlPathId, and urn. Acceptable to use `python3 dr_dk_api.py frontpage --limit 10 --urn`. Response in Danish.

query: Are there any emergency alerts on DR right now?
criteria: Should reference emergencyMessages[] field in __NEXT_DATA__ at props.pageProps.viewProps. Should fetch https://www.dr.dk/nyheder to check.

query: Can I scrape DR's APIs without an API key? Any rate limits?
criteria: Should explain DR has no public API key — endpoints are anonymous, undocumented, may break. Should warn about geo-blocking (DK/GL/FO), robots.txt blocking /soeg/*, /drtv/soeg*, /login/, /auth/ and AI crawlers, and to crawl gently. Should recommend __NEXT_DATA__ as the primary/golden data source over HTML parsing.

query: extract glossary terms from a DR article
criteria: Should describe parsing __NEXT_DATA__ at props.pageProps.viewProps.article.glossary[] for dictionary definitions associated with article terms.

query: Hvor finder jeg DR's etiske retningslinjer og rettelser?
criteria: Should reference https://www.dr.dk/etik-og-rettelser for ethics & corrections, and may mention Pressenævnet (https://www.pressenaevnet.dk/). Response in Danish.
